scene_summary: On the white desktop, a red square metal box is placed at the upper position, a blue rectangular prism is located below the red box, a green cube is set below the blue rectangular prism, a yellow square box is placed at the lower position of the desktop, and a robotic arm is arranged on the left side of the desktop to perform operations.
atomic_tasks: Put the grabbed blue rectangular prism into the red metal box
Put the grabbed green cube into the yellow box
